title: NeoCBadd/CB Redstone Expansion
description: It has added some enchantments some weapons and something of Wireless redstone
body:
# CBadd/NeoCBadd/CB Redstone Expansion
> **模组已被重置(现在有1.19.2和1.20.1以及1.21.1版本)**
> **The mod is being reset(now only 1.19.2 - 1.20.1forge and 1.21.1neoforge).**
> **更新重置前模组到重置后模组请备份存档!**
> **Remember to back up your save files before updating to the NEO version to prevent losses!**

> **(CB Redstone Expansion)它添加了；It added(CB Redstone Expansion):**
1. Wireless redstone "ConnectorBlock" output and input ends,use "ConnectorItem" to connect it.
2. lightweight wireless redstone "WightlessConnectorBlock".
3. wireless redstone controller "KeyTriggerBlock" (controlled by input keys).
4. The wireless redstone system stores using relative coordinates to ensure normal use during structure replication.
5. Tests show that it performs well in Create Aeronautics structures and replications.
6. When using blueprints, try not to rotate them as much as possible to prevent loss of connection.


> **(新CBADD)它添加了；It added(neo cbadd):**
Wait for

> **It added(old cbadd):**
- 1.some fun enchantments(such as Stun and Thief)
- 2.some useful blocks（such as Monster Trap）
- 3.some weapons.
- 4.etc
> Some preview:
- Monster Trap Preview(fix good): (1.19.2/1.20.1)
-![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yhfwAaMG/images/0b41fa076178772a79d46b40aca5792719c2d33a.png)
- Sonic boom Preview: (1.19.2)
- ![sound_boom1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b07bfb6cdfda60e572dafba1d453cb2e45e1630.png)
> Some enchantments:
- 1.Stun 1~3 (1.16.5/1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 2.Thief 1 (1.19.2/1.20.1/1.16.5)
- 3.boom 1~2 (1.16.5/1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 4.boon bow 1 (1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 5.xp theft 1~2 (1.19.2)
- 6.sonic boom 1~2 (1.20.1)rework from 1.19.2
> Some weapons:
- 1.Steel Sword (1.16.5/1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 2.Steel inlaid diamond sword (1.16.5/1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 3.iton bow (1.16.5)
- 4.artillery (1.20.1)
etc
> Some block:
- 1.Monster Trap (1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 2.Senior Monster Trap (1.19.2:19.2.3~4)
- 3.Common landmine (1.16.5/1.19.2/1.20.1)
- 4.Explosive landmine (1.16.5/1.19.2/1.20.1)
> Other things:
- 1.Some Food
- 2.Some Armor
